About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Data Today's data shows two exceptionally strong performers dominating the momentum rankings. BTSG ranks #1 with a composite score of 94.2, driven by outstanding long-term returns (153% over 1 year) combined with clean momentum signals and confirmed volatility; it passes all SMA gates and outperforms SPY by 130% annually while maintaining a low bad-day score of 1.14. EACO follows with similarly impressive 1-year returns of 165% and passes all technical gates, but shows a significant red flag: an extreme ratio_1w_1d value of -173.56 caused by a near-flat 1-day return (-0.03%), suggesting potential price consolidation or a data anomaly that may warrant caution despite strong longer-term metrics. Both tickers correlate most strongly with high-yield bonds (HYG) and tech exposure (QQQ), indicating they are riding broader risk-asset momentum rather than displaying idiosyncratic strength. The vol_ratio above 2.0x for BTSG and confirmed volatility flags suggest these gains come with elevated trading ranges, typical of strong momentum moves.
